summary: MOCCal is a Python application for high-dimensional, multi-omic traveling-wave ion mobility mass spectrometry (TWIM-MS) data analysis.
MOCCal provides functionality for collision cross section (CCS) calibration.
The terms arrival time and drift time are used interchangeably within MOCCal software for convenience.
TWIM platforms record the time at which the ion reaches the detector (arrival time) rather than the time an ion spends within the TWIM cell (drift time).
